specVersion.description: the specification version. MUST be matched against the specification for disambiguation. in this schema it MUST be {"0.0.1"}. SHOULD be matched to disambiguate specifics of a ANT.zip spec
specVersion.$comment: in terms of regex it must be {"^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$"}

fileIntegrity.description: MUST be an array of {{fileIntegrity}} objects

path.description: the File's path relative to {"ANT.json"}, MUST start with {"/"}. MUST be Normalized.

integrity.description: the algorithm and a base58 (bitcoin alphabet) hash of that hash function
